overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit commercial district. The player character walks along a covered pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees, digital billboards, and green neon archways, briefly stopping to observe an NPC before turning around and continuing down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with palm planters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past a red utility box and palm tree planters, with traffic visible on the road to the left

entered.detail: elevated highway or building overhang covering the walkway with large digital screens mounted underneath
large rectangular planters containing palm trees lining the left side of the walkway
large red electrical utility box with warning labels
series of green neon-lit rectangular archways forming a tunnel-like corridor ahead
large illuminated advertising screens on the building facades

segments.scene_description: The player begins walking along a covered nighttime pedestrian walkway in a futuristic city. Palm trees in planters line the left side while a red utility box sits on the right. Ahead, a corridor of green neon archways illuminates the path forward under the shadow of an elevated structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian corridor with seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking through the green neon archway corridor, passing concrete benches and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: sitting on a concrete bench looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: modern concrete seating blocks along the right side of the walkway
black public trash can next to the benches

segments.scene_description: The player continues through the green neon corridor, passing concrete benches and planters. The red utility box falls behind as the archway structure grows closer and larger in the frame. A pedestrian sits on a bench to the right, illuminated by the green neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with NPC interaction area

events.description: player stops walking to face an NPC standing by the wall
player turns around 180 degrees to look back down the street

agents.ego_description: stops to face an NPC in red shorts standing against the wall, then turns completely around to look back the way they came

notable_agents.action: standing still wearing red shorts and a green top, facing the player
sitting on bench looking down at a device in their hands

entered.detail: bright red automated vending machines with illuminated displays
tall vertical digital screen displaying an advertisement with a hand reaching out

segments.scene_description: The player stops to observe an NPC standing by a large vertical billboard, then executes a complete 180-degree turn to look back down the walkway. Red vending machines line the right side, and the green neon archway now appears to the left as the player faces the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with vending machines and pedestrian gathering

events.description: player turns back forward and resumes walking down the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turns back forward and continues walking, approaching a group of three pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 'EL GUAPO' text with a skull graphic
transit station signage with green and white illumination

segments.scene_description: The player resumes walking forward, leaving the green neon archway behind. They pass the red vending machines on the right and approach a group of pedestrians ahead. An 'EL GUAPO' billboard becomes visible on the left as the player continues down the covered commercial walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial walkway that shifts from a forward progression through green archways to a reversal of direction back down the street. It begins by moving along a covered path lined with palm trees and a red utility box, heading toward a corridor of glowing green neon archways beneath an elevated structure. As the camera advances through this green glow, it passes concrete benches and a seated pedestrian before coming to a halt to observe an NPC standing by a large vertical billboard. The perspective then executes a complete 180-degree turn, repositioning the green archways to the left and bringing red vending machines into view on the right. Finally, the camera resumes its forward motion, passing the vending machines and approaching a group of pedestrians as an El Guapo billboard emerges on the left.
